vehicle.label: Tiltrotor VTOL Hybrid
vehicle.desc: Fixed-wing VTOL with 2 tilting rotor nacelles, BVLOS long-range capable

parts.label: Center Fuselage Spine
parts.spec: CFRP box beam center fuselage, avionics bay, wing spar socket, front GPS boom mount, belly camera window

parts.label: Main Wing (2-piece)
parts.spec: Straight wing, 4S NACA 2412, dual 15mm CFRP spar, 900mm half-span, 160mm chord, 3-layer CFRP skin

parts.label: Nacelle Assembly x 2
parts.spec: Tilting nacelle assembly, 0-90deg tilt axis, 6309 bearing set, servo-driven worm gear, motor and ESC pocket

parts.label: Tilt Servo + Linkage x 2
parts.spec: 25kg-cm DS3218 servo per nacelle, titanium pushrod, dual ball joints, tilt range 0-93deg, crash-tolerant

parts.label: V-Tail x 2 (Ruddervator)
parts.spec: +-35deg V-tail ruddervator pair, MG996R servo each, 30deg dihedral, CFRP sandwich panel, hinge piano wire

parts.label: Landing Gear (Tri)
parts.spec: Tricycle landing gear, spring-steel skid arms, 55mm dia wheels, CG at 1/3 chord, 200mm wheelbase

parts.label: Battery Bay (Slide-In)
parts.spec: Belly slide-in battery bay, 6S 8000mAh Li-ion pack, Velcro + strap dual retention, CG position 28% MAC

parts.label: Payload Nose Bay
parts.spec: Interchangeable nose payload bay, Day/IR camera gimbal or survey sensor, 80x60x50mm, 300g payload limit

parts.label: Tilt-Axis Harness + Datum Service Bay
parts.spec: Tiltrotor integration_service module with tilt-axis harness_channel, slack_loop, interface_datum, service_hatch, connector keying, and nacelle-to-wing load-path inspection access

risk.desc: Potential thermal stress on avionics bay due to high operating temperatures.
risk.mit: Implement active cooling systems and thermal management solutions.

risk.desc: Landing gear mount may experience excessive wear due to repeated use.
risk.mit: Use high-wear-resistant materials and incorporate wear indicators.

risk.desc: GPS boom mount may be susceptible to vibrations affecting signal quality.
risk.mit: Design with vibration dampening materials and secure mounting points.

risk.desc: Belly camera window may fog up during operation in humid environments.
risk.mit: Apply anti-fog coating and ensure proper sealing around the window.

risk.desc: Potential structural integrity issues due to unexpected loads.
risk.mit: Conduct extensive load testing and validate structural integrity.

physics_paths.description: Carries wing spar loads into fuselage spine
Airflow management for avionics cooling
Thermal management for avionics bay
Nacelle tilt mechanism clearance and load path
Pressure equalization for avionics bay

internal_feature_targets.description: Main structural beam of the fuselage
Socket for the wing spar to attach
Control surface for pitch and yaw

integration_opportunities.description: Opportunity to add additional sensors for monitoring
Opportunity to add service access points for maintenance
Opportunity to add mounts for payload modules

manufacturing_strategy.datum: Primary locating faces and axis rings
manufacturing_strategy.support: Support structures for FDM and orientation for CNC
manufacturing_strategy.inspection: Visual inspection and CMM for critical dimensions

verification_focus.description: Verification of structural integrity and load path
Verification of thermal management for avionics bay
Verification of service access points for maintenance

verify.value: All required evidence_features are present in part_tree/geometry_ops.
verify.rule: Each required evidence_feature must appear in part_tree/geometry_ops.
The mass_est_g must be a numeric grams value.

verify.value: All physical features are mutually traceable by id/name.
verify.rule: Make part_tree children and geometry_ops mutually traceable by id/name.

verify.value: Each interface has a named neighboring subsystem label and exact joint family.
verify.rule: Name exact neighboring subsystem labels when they mate, and choose connection_type + DOF + clearance_mm + required_feature so the neighbor can declare the same joint family back.

verify.value: Visible insert/washer/locking/preload evidence and torque_Nm or preload intent for critical joints.
verify.rule: Critical joints need visible insert/washer/locking/preload evidence and torque_Nm or preload intent.

risk.desc: Potential misalignment of fuselage spine mount due to tolerance stackup.
risk.mit: Implement tighter tolerance control during manufacturing.

risk.desc: Risk of service access cover failing to provide sufficient clearance for motor/servo module replacement.
risk.mit: Review and adjust clearance dimensions based on actual module sizes.

risk.desc: Possible instability in V-tail and ruddervator mounting due to insufficient depth in mount holes.
risk.mit: Increase the depth of the mount holes to improve stability.

risk.desc: Risk of landing gear mount failing under repeated loading.
risk.mit: Conduct fatigue testing and reinforce the landing gear mount design.

risk.desc: Potential for wing spar to experience unexpected loads due to nacelle tilt mechanism.
risk.mit: Perform load analysis and reinforce the wing spar if necessary.

_subsystem_plan.subsystem_role: Wing spar carrying nacelle loads into fuselage spine; V-tail/ruddervator and landing gear attach structure
physics_paths: Load: Nacelle loads route through bearing seats into wing structure via named fittings
Flow: Motor/servo modules remain replaceable through access covers
Thermal: Heat dissipation from motor/servo modules through wing skin
Pressure: Aerodynamic pressure distribution across wing surface
Electrical: Power and data harnesses run through wing spar
Human: Service access for maintenance and inspection

integration_opportunities: Improve V-tail and ruddervator mounting stability

physics_paths.description: Load from rotor thrust to wing structure via bearing seat and wing spar socket.
Electrical power and control signals from battery to motor via ESC and servo.

Access for motor and ESC replacement and maintenance.

Verify motor and ESC access through service cover.

risk.desc: Potential misalignment during assembly due to tolerance stack-up.
